_comment: BONE-ARMORED generation (2026-07-15): every prop uploads as a SKINNED mesh (one root bone, all verts weighted — rig_glb_to_fbx.py --add-root-bone) so Roblox's delayed optimizer skips it (the pass only mangles statics; skinned = pet-class immortality). Raw Meshy sources with embedded PBR (SurfaceAppearance); >17.5k sources auto-capped ~20k faces by the skinned pipeline. LoadAsset-able Model uploads.
